name: procurestuff
description: A free, self-hosted procurement intake and purchase order alternative.

scripts.typecheck: node --check server/config.js && node --check server/domain.js && node --check server/store.js && node --check server/routes.js && node --check server/index.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/build.js && node --check scripts/lint.js && node --check scripts/secret-scan.js && node --check tests/domain.test.js && node --check tests/api.test.js
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && node scripts/build.js
